ddls:
CREATE TABLE "identification_documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each identification document type */,
  "reference_number" INTEGER /* Reference number assigned to the document type */,
  "data_element" TEXT /* Data element or label present on the document */,
  "usage" TEXT /* Usage category of the document */,
  "definition" TEXT /* Definition of the data element or label */,
  "field_length" TEXT /* Field length specification for the data element */,
  "field_type" TEXT /* Field type specification for the data element */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the document (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_identification_documents_usage FOREIGN KEY ("usage") REFERENCES document_usage ("usage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage category */,
  "usage_name" TEXT /* Name of the usage category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the usage category */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector or industry that uses the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_fields" (
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data field */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the identification document type */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the data field */,
  "field_length" TEXT /* Length specification for the data field */,
  "field_type" TEXT /* Type specification for the data field */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data field */,
  "validation_rules" TEXT /* Validation rules for the data field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_fields_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES identification_documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document version */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the identification document type */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the document */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was revised */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "released_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versions_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES identification_documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the identification document type */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector or industry that uses the document */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Compliance status of the document in the sector */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the last audit for compliance */,
  "auditor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the auditor who performed the audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_compliance_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES identification_documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the identification document type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was reported */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the resolution for the issue */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_issues_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES identification_documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standard */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the identification document type */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the standard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the standard */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the standard became effective */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the standard is up for review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_standards_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES identification_documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the identification document type */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the document */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_access_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES identification_documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, auditor) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the identification document type */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "changed_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_history_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES identification_documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_history_changed_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "parent_doc_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent document type */,
  "child_doc_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the child document type */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship between documents */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_relationships_child_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_doc_id") REFERENCES identification_documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_relationships_parent_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_doc_id") REFERENCES identification_documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the identification document type */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "changed_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_changed_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES identification_documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sector" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sector_document_usage" (
  "sector_doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector-document mapping */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the identification document type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sector_document_usage_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sector ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sector_document_usage_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES identification_documents ("doc_id")
)
